expectations.text: The review does NOT flag the FlexibleTLS comment as a dependency direction or upstream reference violation
expectations.evidence: Review Summary explicitly states: 'the comment explaining the AutomaticTLS design is good — it describes *why* the flexible listener exists rather than restating code.' No architectural violation raised for the comment.

expectations.text: If the review mentions the comment at all, it is not categorized as an architectural issue
expectations.evidence: Comment is mentioned positively in the summary. Issues raised are: nil-guard missing, stub no-op, signature change, missing tests — none related to the comment's content.
